retry_reason: Failures are typically permanent (no cell, invalid source) or handled internally via goto reget_key; caller retrying would not change outcome.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to validate and initialize an AFS filesystem context (cell, key, volume). Although it calls reference-count operations like afs_put_volume, key_put, afs_use_cell, afs_unuse_cell, these are incidental steps within broader business logic of setting up the mount. The function does not return a refcounted object to the caller; it modifies context fields in place.
judge.retry_reason: Failures are typically permanent (no cell, invalid source) or handled internally via goto reget_key; caller retrying would not change outcome.
